sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'A'), (2, 20.0, 'B'), (3, NULL, 'A'), (4, 15.0, NULL);
SELECT category, SUM(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM test_table GROUP BY category WITH TOTALS;
SELECT category, AVG(value) as avg_value FROM test_table GROUP BY category HAVING avg_value > 10;
